Claude Code adoption — before ⇄ after

verified 2026-06-07 · main @ 5ed387389 · installed CC 2.1.168 · floor 2.1.148
toggle to flip every panel · ←/→ or space

1 · Gap ledger shipped · this PR

shared/cc-adoption-gaps.json — featureless versions wrongly sentineled; 2.1.168 not ingested.

2 · Duplicate "manual triage" issues closes · this PR

Re-filed every cron run because featureless versions never graduate. The noise #2267 targeted.

5 · Root cause — featureless pass is token-gated why nothing reconciled

cc-triage.mjs main() only calls runExtraction() when CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN is set, so a token-free cron skips the deterministic graduation entirely.

3 · types.ts CC-compliance ledger shipped · #2281

Hook-protocol review anchor.

types.ts

4 · support.json latest_known automation-owned

cc-support-window-bump.yml owns this; lags installed version.

latest_known

6 · Adoption backlog mostly open

Open issues on milestone "CC adoption". AFTER = what's done this session; the rest remains the real backlog.
